leadText: The Lucarionite (Japanese: ルカリオナイト Lucarionite) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is the Mega Stone that allows Lucario to Mega Evolve into Mega Lucario.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Lucario , the Lucarionite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Lucario if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Lucarionite from Lucario. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Lucario, the Lucarionite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Lucario when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Lucario will remain a Mega Lucario until the Talent Round ends.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Lucario , the Lucarionite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Lucario if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Lucarionite from Lucario.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y One variety of the mysterious Mega Stones. Have Lucario hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Lucario hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Lucario holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.
